filters.q: =from:{{ $json.attendees.filter(a => !a.email.includes($json.company_domain)).map(a => a.email).join(' OR from:') }} after:{{ new Date(new Date($json.meeting_date).getTime() - ($json.window_days || 7)*24*60*60*1000).toISOString().split('T')[0].replace(/-/g,'/') }} before:{{ new Date(new Date($json.meeting_date).getTime() + ($json.window_days || 7)*24*60*60*1000).toISOString().split('T')[0].replace(/-/g,'/') }}

nodes.name: Gmail: Search Email Thread
nodes.notes: Credential: Gmail OAuth2 stored in n8n Credentials store. Graceful skip on error — downstream core logic handles missing email_context.
